title: TNSRLM Tirunelveli – Community Bank Coordinator – 7 Posts
shortInfo: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Tirunelveli (TNSRLM Tirunelveli) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Community Bank Coordinator. Candidates with 12th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through TNSRLM Tirunelveli official website tirunelveli.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Tirunelveli Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Tirunelveli (TNSRLM Tirunelveli) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Community Bank Coordinator. Candidates with 12th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through TNSRLM Tirunelveli official website tirunelveli.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Pass, Member of Panchayat Level Federation Self Help Group, Minimum 2 years experience as Self Help Group Animator, Resident of the concerned Panchayat, Target group identified through participatory rural appraisal, Good communication skills, Experience in bank transactions and loan applications, Preference for computer skills and two-wheeler driving license, Android phone with ability to send SMS and WhatsApp messages and operate apps

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tirunelveli.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
